sizing_rule.note: Use optimal f calculated from mathematical expectation and worst-case loss. Reduce sizing toward infinitesimal amounts as correlation between market systems approaches -1.00. Example: optimal f of 0.14 for system with $0.40 expectation.

source_rule_text: Position sizing should be reduced toward infinitesimal amounts when correlation between market systems approaches -1.00, and should be optimized using the optimal f value calculated from the mathematical expectation and worst-case loss of the trading system.
